feedback.text: Google is attempting to block the use of side loaders and APK files to download apps outside of their Play Store by requiring developers to submit their IDs and addresses. They claim it won't affect side loading, but this doesn't apply to apps that are no longer available in the play store for whatever reason, as well as for people who are region restricted. This will affect anyone using apps not directly verified by them, and will restrict the freedoms many users. End user owns the phone and should have a freedom to install whatever he wants.
